rows.behavior: route-availability
align ON visible via context snapshot on all clients incl. final-output
align OFF roundtrip remains deterministic across all polling clients
context-update visible on all clients
draft baseline replicated without drift
start deterministic across 4 polling clients
room start keeps draft animation/target/sliders stable (no jump to cluster/Malfunction)
stop deterministic across 4 polling clients
snapshot trigger revision/key parity across 4 polling clients
global trigger remains active without explicit snapshot stop
explicit stop removes global animation and records stop revision
stagger draft config replicated via snapshot runtime state
sequential stagger member delay parity across polling clients
cluster start keeps draft target path stable
room-click target autofill remains target-only path
burst + clear-all leaves no residual animation
board switch atomically clears running list on all clients
reconnect snapshot keeps board-switch running-clear no-residue parity
switch + reconnect keeps crossBoardResidueCount = 0 across clients incl. final-output
command/snapshot gate counters available
